videos.title: Build a Blog with HTML & CSS - Full Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how to build a complete blog website from scratch using HTML5 and CSS3. Includes homepage, blog post, and responsive design.

videos.title: HTML & CSS Blog Website Tutorial
videos.description: A hands-on tutorial for creating a modern blog website layout with semantic HTML and CSS Grid.

videos.title: Responsive Blog Layout with CSS Grid
videos.description: Learn how to use CSS Grid to create responsive blog layouts that work on all screen sizes.

videos.title: Dark Mode Toggle with CSS & JavaScript
videos.description: Implement a dark mode toggle for your blog using CSS custom properties, JavaScript, and localStorage.

videos.title: Web Design for Bloggers: Typography & Layout
videos.description: Learn typography and layout principles specifically for blog websites to create readable, engaging content.
